queries.question: What designers use modern styles, and what architects also use the same style?
queries.sql:
SELECT Interior_Designer.name
FROM Style JOIN Interior_Designer ON Style.style_id = Interior_Designer.design_style
WHERE Style.style_name = "Modern"
UNION
SELECT Landscape_Architect.name
FROM Style JOIN Landscape_Architect ON Style.style_id = Landscape_Architect.landscape_style
WHERE Style.style_name = "Modern"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?style a :Styles .
    ?interior_designer a :Interior_Designers .
    ?interior_designer p:hasStyle ?style .
    ?interior_designer p:name ?name .
    ?style p:style_name ?style_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?style_name_f) = "Modern")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?style a :Styles .
    ?landscape_architect a :Landscape_Architects .
    ?landscape_architect p:hasStyle ?style .
    ?landscape_architect p:name ?name .
    ?style p:style_name ?style_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?style_name_f) = "Modern")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all designers and also provide a list of modern architects.
queries.sql:
SELECT Interior_Designer.name
FROM Style JOIN Interior_Designer ON Style.style_id = Interior_Designer.design_style
UNION
SELECT Landscape_Architect.name
FROM Style JOIN Landscape_Architect ON Style.style_id = Landscape_Architect.landscape_style
WHERE Style.style_name = "Modern"

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?style a :Styles .
    ?interior_designer a :Interior_Designers .
    ?interior_designer p:hasStyle ?style .
    ?interior_designer p:name ?name .

  }
  UNION
  {
    ?style a :Styles .
    ?landscape_architect a :Landscape_Architects .
    ?landscape_architect p:hasStyle ?style .
    ?landscape_architect p:name ?name .
    ?style p:style_name ?style_name_f .

}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide modern architects and designers.
